entities.name: sotorasib
entities.context: Sotorasib is a first-in-class KRAS G12C covalent inhibitor approved for NSCLC.

entities.name: KRAS
entities.context: KRAS G12C is a mutant oncogene found in approximately 13% of NSCLC patients.

entities.name: non-small cell lung cancer
entities.context: Non-small cell lung cancer accounts for 85% of lung cancer cases.

entities.name: covalent inhibition
entities.context: Sotorasib acts through covalent inhibition of the KRAS G12C mutant protein.

relations.evidence: Sotorasib selectively targets KRAS G12C mutant protein.
Sotorasib is indicated for the treatment of NSCLC with KRAS G12C mutation.
Sotorasib exerts its effect through irreversible covalent binding to KRAS G12C.
